rulings.Case Title: IBRAHIM KAILEH ET AL VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESEDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 12, 2018 line 1. PETITIONERS IBRAHIM KAILEH, MAHA KAILEH'S Re-Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate continued to January 11, 2019. Moving party is ordered to provide a copy of the Administrative Record, Hearing Transcript and ALJ decision no later than December 21, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MASAZUMI INOUE ET AL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 12, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FAST CAPITAL, LLC. ET AL VS. LA COSTA LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prejudgment Order Of Attachment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 12, 2018 line 5. Joint Motion For Prejudgment Order Of Attachment DENIED. Moving party failed to show probable validity of its claim(s). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 650 ELLIS I7, LP VS. JAMES LINEWEAVER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, If Entered And Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 12, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT JAMES LINEWEAVER'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, If Entered And Quash Service Of Summons DENIED. (1) Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 as to motion to set aside default; (2) No default entered in this action; judgment on file is based on breach of stipulation; (3) Defendant submitted to this Court's jurisdiction by filing his answer; Motion to Quash is untimely; (4) No proof of service for this motion on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN DOMINGUEZ VS. RAQUEL MCGILL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 12, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT RAQUEL MCGILL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to make required "dominant motive" and "enumerated grounds" allegations per SFRO 37.9(c) ("In any action to recover possession of the rental unit under Section 37.9, the landlord must plead and prove that at least one of the grounds enumerated in Section 37.9(a) or (b) and also stated in the notice to vacate is the dominant motive for recovering possession."). Plaintiff shall also reconcile allegations in paragraph 7(a)(1) with Exhibit 2. = (501/REQ)
